chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.S-107 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.9259/2020. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.9260/2020. 4. For hearing of main case. 21.12.2020 Mr. Saifullah Dashti, Advocate for applicant. == 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3&4. The instant revision application is filed against the order dated 05.12.2020 passed by learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad whereby an application filed by the applicant under section 540 Cr.P.C for examination of Inspector Sirajuddin Lashari as her witness in Direct Complaint has been dismissed. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the examination of Inspector Sirajuddin Lashari was essential to arrive at right conclusion, therefore, the impugned order being illegal is liable to be set-aside. I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. Inspector Sirajuddin Lashari was not examined by the complainant as her witness during course of preliminary enquiry, therefore, he as such could hardly be examined by learned Trial Court as a witness of the complainant at belated stage of the trial. No illegality even otherwise is pointed in the impugned order which may justify this Court to make interference with it. Consequently, the instant Criminal Revision Application is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
